---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, filter, dataset improvement, or documentation change
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user need or data question should this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior you want.

## Alternatives considered

List any simpler or safer approaches you considered.

## Data and security impact

- Does this change add new inputs?
- Does it change the dataset, source, or preprocessing?
- Does it affect the read-only security model?

## Checks

- [ ] I searched existing issues.
- [ ] I considered whether this can be solved with an existing tool.
- [ ] This request does not include private data or secrets.
